name: Ras Al Khaimah (United Arab Emirates)

colors.symbolism: the narrow border of the flag

description: A plain red field with a narrow white border along all four edges.
history: Ras Al Khaimah was the last of the seven emirates to join the United Arab Emirates, in February 1972. Its flag is the same plain red used by the historical Trucial States, with a narrow white border that is sometimes shown.
